name: Singapore Model AI Governance Framework
description: Singapore's Model AI Governance Framework — voluntary AI governance framework published by IMDA and PDPC. Second edition (2020) and Generative AI Model AI Governance Framework (2024) cover the domain.
relationToCloudSecurity: Singapore-specific guidance; AI deployed in any environment including cloud.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI governance framework, internationally referenced.

license.notes: Singapore government publication. Reuse generally permitted; verify at IMDA / AI Verify Foundation source.

links.acquisition_blocker_resolved: HTTP 200 but only 6 markdown lines — heavily JS-rendered PDPC page. Direct PDF download from pdpc.gov.sg required.

current_extraction.notes: Captured via playwright headless browser (JS-rendered PDPC site). Page describes Singapore's two-track Model AI Governance Framework: original (traditional AI) and 2024 generative-AI extension. Links to downloadable PDFs are referenced; PDF acquisition is a follow-up.
